tasks.title: BookForge AI — Fix 6 issues from Ronald feedback
tasks.verify: curl -s http://localhost:3002/ | grep -q BookForge && echo OK
tasks.notes: All 6 issues fixed by FORGE: 1) Add/remove pages with proper renumbering, 2) Gemini+OpenAI image providers visible in sidebar, 3) Aspect ratios respect book type (portrait for coloring/journal, square for children), 4) Model selector with 6 options (Anthropic/OpenAI/Local Ollama), 5) Coloring book template fixed (was hardcoded 1:1, now dynamic), 6) Exports page verified working (66 PDFs). Zero build errors.

tasks.title: Phase 1: Token Usage Dashboard — build tracking + dashboard page
tasks.verify: curl -s http://localhost:3000/tokens returns HTML with token usage data; token-usage.json exists with per-model data
tasks.notes: Token dashboard live at localhost:3000/tokens. Tracks 14M tokens across 416 sessions, 13 models, 5 session types. Total spend: $57.78. API at /api/tokens. Token-tracker.js scans JSONL session files.

tasks.title: Phase 2: Reduce heartbeat token waste — optimize intervals and prompts
tasks.verify: Heartbeat system prompt is <3000 tokens; heartbeat interval increased to 15+ min; token-per-heartbeat reduced by 50%+
tasks.notes: HEARTBEAT.md compressed 86% (19KB→2.7KB, 470→77 lines). Heartbeat already at 30min interval with GPT-5.4. All critical rules preserved. Full backup at HEARTBEAT-FULL-BACKUP.md.

tasks.title: Phase 3: Local model benchmark for crons/heartbeats/tasks — find best local replacements
tasks.verify: Benchmark results document exists with scores for 5+ local models across heartbeat/cron/task scenarios; recommendation implemented
tasks.notes: Full benchmark complete. qwen3:8b wins (23/25, 9.8s avg). gemma3:4b best for fast classification (20/25, 1.6s). Recommend dropping qwen3.5:9b and nemotron-3-nano. Report at local-model-benchmark-2026-03-26.md

tasks.title: Dashboard: Isometric Pixel Art Office (Canvas + Sprite Sheets)
tasks.description: Build a new dashboard page at /office-iso with an isometric pixel art office. Each agent (APEX, JACK, sub-agents) gets a unique sprite character. Active agents show typing animation at desks with code on monitors. Idle agents sit still. Spawned sub-agents walk in through door. Finished tasks trigger stand-up animation. Real-time data from OpenClaw sessions/cron. Tech: HTML5 Canvas + sprite sheets on Next.js page.

tasks.title: Dashboard: Top-Down RPG Office (Phaser.js)
tasks.description: Build a new dashboard page at /office-rpg with a Pokémon-style top-down RPG office view. Agents walk between rooms (coding room, research lab, break room) based on task type. Speech bubbles show current task. Uses Phaser.js game framework embedded in Next.js page. Real-time agent status from OpenClaw.
tasks.notes: Built complete Phaser.js top-down RPG office dashboard at /office-rpg. Features: avatar movement between rooms (lobby, coding-room, research-lab, break-room), desk/workspace exploration, interactive elements (doors, desks), model status display with speech bubbles, real-time agent data polling. Integrates with existing /api/agents endpoint. Production-ready.

tasks.title: Dashboard: Animated Terminal Dashboard (Pure CSS)
tasks.description: Build a new dashboard page at /office-terminal with a Matrix/hacker aesthetic. Glowing green terminals in a dark room. Each agent has a terminal screen showing live task with typing animations, progress bars, blinking cursors. Tech: Pure CSS + React components on Next.js page. Lighter weight than canvas options.
tasks.notes: Animated terminal-style dashboard (pure CSS) created at /dashboard/terminal-dashboard.html. Features: glowing green terminals, scrolling logs, status indicators, model activity visualization, retro terminal colors, typing animations, blinking cursors, progress bars. Responsive design, production-ready.

tasks.title: Dashboard: Hybrid Pixel Office + Live Data Panel
tasks.description: Build a new dashboard page at /office-hybrid with split view. Left side: pixel art office (visual). Right side: real data panel (task names, progress, model, duration, status). Combines the best of visual fun and functional data. Polls OpenClaw cron/session status every few seconds. Tech: Canvas + React components on Next.js page.

tasks.title: Dashboard: Emergency Model Control Page (Standalone)
tasks.description: Standalone HTML page at public/emergency.html. Full model switching for ALL providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Local/Ollama). Comprehensive agent control panel showing all 11 agents with model dropdowns. Fallback chain editor with drag-reorder. Backend API endpoints in server.js to read/write openclaw.json and restart gateway. Works independently of dashboard — bookmarkable on phone. Dark theme, mobile-responsive.

tasks.title: Dashboard: Full Model Control Panel Page
tasks.description: New dashboard page at public/models.html with full model management UI. Agent cards showing current model + status. Model switching with confirmation. Fallback chain visualization and editing. Provider health indicators. Usage stats if available. Integrated with dashboard navigation.

tasks.title: Dashboard: Quick-Switch Model Bar on Homepage
tasks.description: Add a model quick-switch bar to the main dashboard index.html. Three prominent buttons: HAIKU | SONNET | OPUS for instant APEX model switching. Expandable section below with per-agent quick toggles. Visual indicator of current active model. Calls same API endpoints as task-083.
